title: Resolver adjustments for macro expand

source.subject: fix(compiler): resolver adjustments for macro expand

body:
## Outcome

Resolver adjustments for macro expand.

## Context

- Workstream **analysis-pipeline** — compiler pipeline and api.json spine.
- Macro work follows platform-spec **language-meta/macros** semantics (registry, expand pass, resolver re-resolve).

## Provenance
